data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an abandoned booking recovery sequence, which includes specific messaging at defined intervals. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of the implementation of the required messages ('Forgot something?', 'Still interested? Here's 10% off', 'Last chance - expires tomorrow.') or the timing of these messages. The absence of this critical information indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation of the abandoned booking recovery messaging sequence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
